name: munch
description: Augmented cognitive agent plugin with full-stack, design, engineering, and polyglot capabilities.

interface.shortDescription: Augmented cognitive agent — full-stack coding, UI/UX, architecture, security, analysis.
interface.longDescription: Munch is an augmented cognitive agent that integrates anti-regression tracking, adaptive user modeling, BTL build loop, OWASP security scanning, and polyglot code generation.
